description: Create the /solar-roi/analyze page with address/geolocation input, API integration, results dashboard with free/pro tiers, and Google Maps attribution.
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/app/solar-roi/analyze/page.tsx as the main page component (server component for metadata)

Create /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/components/calculators/SolarAnalyzer.tsx as the client component ('use client') that contains: (a) An address input field with a 'Use My Location' button that uses navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition to get lat/lng, (b) An alternative manual lat/lng input mode, (c) Integration with Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) geocoding API for address-to-coordinates: fetch https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q={address}&format=json&limit=1 with appropriate User-Agent header, (d) A submit button that calls /api/solar/insights with the coordinates, (e) Loading state with skeleton/spinner while waiting for results, (f) Error handling for geolocation permission denied, API errors, rate limit exceeded (show upgrade CTA for 429)

Build the results dashboard section in SolarAnalyzer.tsx showing: FREE TIER results (always visible): roof area estimate, recommended panel count, total capacity (kW), annual energy production (kWh), simple payback period, estimated monthly savings. PRO TIER results (gated behind useProStatus().isPro check, show blurred/locked for free users with upgrade CTA): full financial analysis (lease vs buy vs finance options from financialAnalyses), monthly production breakdown, all roof segment details, CO2 offset calculation (use 0.42 kg CO2/kWh as US average grid emission factor)

Use existing UI components: Card/CardContent from @/components/ui/card, Button from @/components/ui/button, Input from @/components/ui/input, Badge from @/components/ui/badge. Use lucide-react icons (Sun, MapPin, Zap, DollarSign, Lock, Leaf, TrendingUp). Follow the visual style of components/calculators/SolarForm.tsx.
Add Google Maps attribution at the bottom of results: 'Solar data provided by Google Solar API. (c) Google Maps' as required by policy
Track daily lookup count on the client side using localStorage (key: 'solar_lookups', value: { count: number, date: string }) and show remaining lookups to the user
The page metadata should have title 'Analyze Your Rooftop Solar Potential - CostSmart' and appropriate description and canonical URL
acceptance_criteria: Page /solar-roi/analyze renders with address input and 'Use My Location' button
Nominatim geocoding converts address text to lat/lng coordinates
Browser geolocation API is used when 'Use My Location' is clicked
Results dashboard shows panel count, capacity, annual production, payback period for free users
Pro-only sections (financial breakdown, all segments, CO2) are visually gated with a lock icon and upgrade CTA for non-pro users
Google Maps attribution text is displayed when results are shown
Rate limit feedback is shown when 429 is returned from API
Loading state is displayed while API request is in progress
The component uses useProStatus() hook to check pro status
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && pnpm build' and confirm it compiles without errors
